title: Resolution Strongly Recommending to the Local, Provincial and National Inter-agency Task Force (IATF) for the Management of Emerging Infectious Diseases (EID) to Allow the Conduct of Contact Sports Activities (E.G. BASKETBALL, VOLLEYBALL, FOOTBALL, ETC.) That Are Currently Being Restricted with the Provisions That All Shall Be Vaccinated and Observing Minimum Health Standard Protocols Set by the Iatf. (AUTHOR: COUNCILOR MARLO PJ A. ALIPON, REE, RMP, MPA, 11/28/2021)
